question: According to the guide, where on the process instance page can a user initiate a retry of an incident-blocked instance in Operate?

options.text: In the top right corner of the page, and below the Operations panel.
Only via the global Operations menu on the Operate dashboard.
From the Modeler deployment dialog, after redeploying the process.
Via `zbctl --insecure resolve incident`; the Operate UI has no retry control.

a.text: The guide states there are two places on the process instance page where you can initiate a retry: in the top right corner of the page and below Operations.

b.text: Retry is initiated on the process instance page itself, not from a global dashboard menu.

c.text: Modeler is for editing and deploying models; instance-level retry is an Operate action on the running instance.

d.text: The guide describes resolving the incident through the Operate UI, not via a CLI command.

explanation: The guide is explicit that the retry control appears in two places on the process instance page: the top right corner and below the Operations section. Both trigger a re-evaluation of the failing element after the variable has been fixed.
